brand.name: blankxiro Studio
brand.description: Your vision, our craftsmanship. We handle the production, packaging, and delivery so you can focus on building your brand.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.statement: At blankxiro Studio, we empower creators and entrepreneurs to launch their own premium clothing lines without the hassle of inventory or production. We provide high-quality garment blanks, state-of-the-art DTG printing, and professional packaging services. Our goal is to be the backbone of your brand, ensuring every piece that reaches your customer is a testament to quality and style. From a single piece to bulk orders, we scale with you, providing the tools and support needed to turn your creative vision into a thriving business.

community.title: HOW IT WORKS
community.subtitle: Launch your brand in three simple steps. We handle the heavy lifting while you focus on design.

timeline.title: 1. Create Your Design
timeline.description: Upload your artwork and choose from our range of premium garment blanks. Whether it's a minimalist logo or a complex graphic, our high-quality DTG printing ensures your vision is captured perfectly.

timeline.title: 2. Place Your Order
timeline.description: Once your design is ready, place an order with your customer's details. We offer a low MOQ of just 1 piece for most items, making it easy to start small and scale as you grow.

timeline.title: 3. We Produce & Ship
timeline.description: We handle the printing, custom branding, and professional packaging. Your orders are dispatched within 24–72 hours across India, delivered directly to your customers under your brand name.

pricing.title: Premium Print-on-Demand Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing for premium quality. All prices in INR. Neck logo printing included free.

testimonials.title: What Our Partners Say
testimonials.subtitle: Join hundreds of creators who have launched their brands with blankxiro Studio.

list.testimonial: blankxiro Studio has been a game-changer for my brand. The quality of the 240 GSM oversized tees is unmatched, and the DTG printing is incredibly sharp.
The low MOQ allowed me to start my clothing line with just a few designs. Their fulfillment is fast, and the custom packaging really elevates the unboxing experience.
I've tried several POD services in India, but blankxiro's attention to detail and fabric quality is on another level. Highly recommended for serious brands.

chatbot.title: blankxiro Assistant
chatbot.welcomeMessage: Hi! I'm the blankxiro Studio assistant. How can I help you with your print-on-demand needs today?
chatbot.placeholder: Ask about pricing, garments, or shipping...
